violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the storage room 2-door reach-in have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025

The doors to the outside, located in the entrance, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the dairy reach-in and the storage room cold hold unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
Receiving door is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2023

Refrigerator door gaskets of the 2-door reach-in located in the storage room were observed in poor repair, splitting away from the doors. Gaskets must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the dairy shelves have an accumulation of dried milk residue and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned frequently to prevent such build-up. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023
